name: Pinkfong Wonderstar
overview: A pink, extraterrestrial fox named Pinkfong and his friend, Hogi (a green and beige hedgehog) are a duo called "Wonderstar". They help the people of Wonderville in each episode. At the end, the duo get a friendship badge. Wonderstar has cool abilities. Pinkfong has a star shaped necklace with magical powers while Hogi is very intelligent.

trailers.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar | Official Trailer | YouTube Originals
